scripts.copy-backend: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$dst = Get-ChildItem -Path dist -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'IngeteamViajes-win32-x64*' } | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $dst) { throw 'No se encontró carpeta empaquetada en dist'; } Copy-Item -Recurse -Force ..\Backend ($dst.FullName + '\\Backend'); Write-Host ('✅ Backend copiado a ' + $dst.FullName + '\\Backend')"
scripts.pack:with-backend: npm run pack && npm run copy-backend
